brand.name: Thikana Café
brand.description: Authentic kulhad chai, freshly brewed coffee, and traditional snacks in a cozy, eco-friendly environment.

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80), border-b border-[#6F4E37]/10. Must contain logo, links (Home, Menu, About, Gallery, Contact), and CTA (WhatsApp button).
components.hero: Full viewport height or min-h-[80vh]. Background image with bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast. Text left-aligned or centered, large H1, tagline above H1, CTA button.
components.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#6F4E37] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#5A3E2B] transition-colors. Secondary/WhatsApp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#1EBE5D] flex items-center gap-2.
components.cards: bg-[#F5F5DC] rounded-2xl p-8 border border-[#6F4E37]/10 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform

Home.Hero: Hero with background image, H1, description, CTA.
Home.Features: 4-column grid (Freshly brewed chai, Traditional kulhad, Eco-friendly, Hangout spot). Icons in #D97736.
Home.MenuPreview: 3-4 cards highlighting bestsellers. 'View Full Menu' button.
Home.Testimonials: Clean soft cards with organic earthy quotes.

Menu.Categories: Tabs or scroll spy for 'Chai Varieties', 'Coffee', 'Snacks'. List layout with dotted leader connecting item name and price.

About.Story: Split layout. Text on left about the 'kulhad culture', image on right.

Gallery.Layout: Asymmetric bento grid of cafe ambiance and food.

Contact.Layout: Split layout. Left: Contact info, Opening Hours, WhatsApp CTA. Right: Generic Google Maps embed iframe.

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling via CSS scroll-behavior: smooth.
motion.hover: Subtle translate-y-1 and shadow-lg on cards. Scale on floating buttons.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, matching text_main or primary colors.

hero_bg.description: Brown clay pots / kulhad chai on wooden table. Use as hero background with black/40 overlay.

about_image.description: Close up of kulhad cup. Perfect for about page.

gallery_3.description: Indian cafe food/snacks on wooden board.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the website is entirely static frontend built with React Router (Home, Menu, About, Gallery, Contact pages). Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for creative sections, use raw HTML and Tailwind. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form inputs. Use the exact text/data provided. Ensure contrast on text placed over images using drop-shadow or text-shadow or bg-black/40 overlay. The site must be responsive and visually appealing matching an organic warm earthy theme.
